description_long: This storage box is constructed from dark, rugged wooden planks arranged horizontally and framed by thick, reinforced metal bands at the edges and corners. The wood appears slightly uneven and weathered, giving the box a robust, utilitarian look suitable for urban environments. Large, square metal bolts secure the frame at each corner, enhancing its durability and industrial aesthetic. The top of the box is open, revealing the interior, which is also lined with wooden planks. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, emphasizing its simple, functional design. The overall appearance suggests it is designed for heavy-duty storage or transport of goods in garages, warehouses, or outdoor urban settings.
description: A sturdy, open-topped wooden storage box reinforced with thick metal bands and bolts, featuring a rugged, industrial look. The box is unadorned, with no handles or locks, and is suitable for heavy-duty urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horizontal wooden planks and prominent metal frame with bolts; the open top is partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view with a similar arrangement of wooden planks and metal framing, but the planks' alignment and gaps are more visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the same robust construction, with the wood grain and metal bolts clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 1, with the open top and reinforced corners in clear view.
